name: ♠️DAVE MILLER - DSAF♣️
description:
💭 Just Another Day…

Yippee! Another Dave bot, this time more canon leaning but with some of my hcs mixed in.

And also, he’s actually trying to improve!! Yayy!!!

I wanted to do more of a light-hearted Dave bot, cuz he’s just a silly goofy guy.

I made this bot with DaveSport in mind, but it’s flexible.

Art is my own, I’m gonna start putting up bots with my own art soon.
creator: afuckindegenerate
